Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(research): add automated backtest engine for hypothesis validation

Two-tier backtest system for validating research hypotheses against
historical data before risking capital:

- Statistical backtest (TypeScript): rolling 9mo/3mo windows over
  labeled_patterns, computes win rate/Sharpe/PF per window, determines
  pass/fail verdict based on mean Sharpe and consistency thresholds
- ML backtest (Python): retrains XGBoost via walk-forward on
  hypothesis-filtered subset, reuses existing walk_forward engine

Pure functions with 28 unit tests (including fast-check property tests),
hypothesis detail dialog with backtest controls and results visualization,
atomic DB writes via Prisma transaction, status polling until completion.

commit.message:
Hearth: extract shared scroll viewport helper to eliminate per-panel scroll bugs (Forge-xom) (#95)

* fix: extract shared scrollViewport helper to eliminate per-panel scroll bugs

Replace duplicated scroll logic across Hearth TUI panels with a shared
scrollViewport struct that properly separates cursor selection from viewport
offset. This fixes the Ready to Merge panel where the viewport jumped with
the cursor instead of scrolling smoothly, and prevents future panels from
reintroducing the same bug.

The scrollViewport struct provides ScrollUp, ScrollDown, ClampToTotal,
AdjustViewport, and VisibleRange methods used by Queue, Workers, Needs
Attention, and Ready to Merge panels.

Bead: Forge-xom

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  the doc comment that says both cursor and viewStart are adjusted
- UpdateQueueMsg handler now calls queueVP.ClampToTotal to prevent a
  stale cursor pointing past the end after queue refreshes

Moved Stripe availability check and deposit calculation BEFORE the

Now these pre-checks return early without creating orphaned bookings.

Save kernel.js as part of hermitcrab state (#43)

Each hermitcrab now saves its running kernel to state/kernel.js
alongside blocks and other state. On restore, the kernel source is
written to hc:_kernel in localStorage. This gives each hermitcrab
ownership of its cognition engine — future kernel updates become
available, not forced.

Remove unnecessary dash connectors from website copy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix clamshell: revert display reconfig, use caffeinate for lid-close

The mirror relationship has the built-in display mirroring the virtual
(virtual is primary). Lid close just removes the follower — the virtual
display keeps working. The reconfig callback was actively breaking things.

Replaced IOPMAssertions with caffeinate -dims child process. Lid close
is a hardware sleep trigger that overrides software assertions without
a real external display. caffeinate with -s flag (system sleep, AC only)
is the only reliable way to keep the Mac awake with the lid closed.

commit.message:
Initial implementation of Bounce VST

Physics-based instrument plugin (VST3 + AU) for Ableton on macOS.
Shapes fall under gravity, triggering musical notes on collision with
borders and each other. Each shape type has a unique waveform and
note set. Includes root/scale/octave controls and a 32-voice synth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix phantom collision when pressing UP near top lane boundary

barneyLane only snapped to the target lane when barneyY was within
1px of LANE_Y[target] — meaning during the entire lerp transition
(~0.45s) barneyLane was still the source lane. A player visually
at lane 0 (y=201) still had barneyLane=1, so middle-lane obstacles
could hit them even though they appeared to be safely in the top lane.

Fix: replace barneyLane with physLane (closest LANE_Y to barneyY) in
checkCollisions(), so the hit zone always reflects the player's actual
on-screen position rather than the delayed logical lane value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix asteroid/colony visual positions frozen in SERVER mode (MP)

Asteroids and colonies showed zero movement in MP despite planets moving
correctly. Visual positions were read from orbital_angle accumulation,
disconnected from the _sim_elapsed time source used by planets.

Definitive fix: _update_asteroid_targets and _update_colony_targets now
compute positions analytically as:
  initial_angle + (TAU/period) * (sim_elapsed - spawn_elapsed)
using CelestialData.get_sim_elapsed() — same time source as planets.
Initial angle and spawn time stored in marker meta at spawn.

Also: sync_to_ticks() returns snap delta; apply_server_state() advances
asteroid/colony orbital_angle values by the delta when a time snap occurs,
keeping gameplay positions (used by ship navigation) in sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Security hardening + execution robustness for enterprise deployment

Phase 1 - Critical Security:
- Remove --no-sandbox, --disable-web-security, --disable-features=IsolateOrigins
  from all browser launch points (recorder, executor, test runner, browser controller)
- Replace eval() with safe-assertion-evaluator.js that blocks require/process/fs
  injection in SOQL assertion expressions
- Add sanitizeForLog() to mask credentials in console output
- Gate DevTools IPC handlers behind !app.isPackaged for production builds
- Add isValidIPCSender() validation on sensitive IPC channels (install, browse, external)
- Default ignoreHTTPSErrors: false across all 8 browser launch locations

Phase 2 - High Severity:
- Add maskSensitiveBodyContent() to network-capture.js for request/response body
  masking (password, token, api_key, ssn, credit_card fields)
- Add cookie/storage isolation between recording sessions via clearCookies()

Phase 3 - Execution Robustness:
- Auto-retry on step failure with configurable retryCount (0-5) and retryDelay
- Continue-on-failure mode to run all steps and report all failures
- Screenshot capture on step failure with base64 inline display
- Playwright trace file capture (screenshots + DOM snapshots) saved as .zip
- JUnit XML report export for CI/CD pipeline integration
- Self-contained HTML report generation with inline CSS and screenshots
- GET /test-runs/{id}/export?format=junit|html endpoint
- New settings UI: Step Retry Count, Retry Delay, Continue on Failure
- Skipped step status (gray) in TestResultsPanel for dependency failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix RecursionError when running consecutive LoRA training

The monkey-patch on enable_input_require_grads stacked on itself across
training runs, causing infinite recursion. Now guards against double-
patching by checking for the sentinel attribute first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Also reduced DPI from 150 to 100 and capped pages at 20.
